allow: Bash(python -c "from oletools.olevba import VBA_Parser; vp = VBA_Parser\('/tmp/gab.xlsm'\); [print\('---',n,'---\\n',code\) for \(f,s,n,code\) in vp.extract_all_macros\(\) if code]")

PowerShell($p='HKCU:\\Software\\Microsoft\\Office\\16.0\\Excel\\Security'; if\(!\(Test-Path $p\)\){New-Item -Path $p -Force | Out-Null}; $orig = \(Get-ItemProperty -Path $p -Name AccessVBOM -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).AccessVBOM; Set-ItemProperty -Path $p -Name AccessVBOM -Value 1 -Type DWord; "original=$orig; now=$\(\(Get-ItemProperty -Path $p -Name AccessVBOM\).AccessVBOM\)")
